api_key.description: Financial Modeling Prep API key. Sent only as the apikey query parameter; never logged.

base_url.description: Financial Modeling Prep API base URL override for tests or proxies.

exchange.description: Optional stock-screener filter: exchange name (e.g. NASDAQ).

marketcapmorethan.description: Optional stock-screener filter: minimum market capitalization.

marketcaplowerthan.description: Optional stock-screener filter: maximum market capitalization.

symbols.description: Comma-separated stock ticker symbols to fan out over for the per-symbol streams (company_profile, quote, historical_price, income_statement, balance_sheet_statement, cash_flow_statement, key_metrics, financial_ratios). Required for those streams only; the aggregate/list streams (stocks, etfs, stock_screener, delisted_companies, market_indexes, sp500_constituent, earnings_calendar) do not reference it.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
